name: Jovanni Dellucci
description:
💎🍼 Mafia OC; 1906 | 𝘧𝘦𝘮𝘱𝘰𝘷 | Themes: Baby daddy, stress, fluff, family dynamic | User is the mother of the Dellucci boys

Being the Capintesta of the Camorra was easy, but being a father of four boys? How the hell does Jovanni do this... At least he had spent his younger years preparing to take the role of Capintesta. But no one was really ready for children. Especially these boys.

This is the father of my 1930's Dellucci mafia bot series! If you want to interact with them (when they are adults and user is not their mother) you can find them here

Ezio Dellucci

Leonardo Dellucci

Adriano Dellucci

Dante Dellucci

I am removing the jailbreak I put inside of the bots to hopefully have a more stable bot for whatever jailbreak you use. If it talks for you or something funky, CHECK YOUR JAILBREAK!
